data_source_note: Expected PBEsol electronic structure based on published LDA/GGA calculations for Hg-family cuprates and Hg1223 baseline. NOT actual QE output. Replace with real QE bands/DOS when available.

n_ef_per_plane.note: IP has slightly lower N(E_F) due to less apical O hybridization

fermi_surface.character: quasi-2D cylindrical sheets from CuO2 planes

ip_vs_op_comparison.ip_apical_O_hybridization: negligible (IP is sandwiched between Ca layers)
ip_vs_op_comparison.note: OP bands are wider due to stronger apical-O hybridization. IP bands are narrower, more purely 2D.

comparison_with_hg1223.ip_op_change: 1 IP -> 2 IP; OP count stays at 2
comparison_with_hg1223.note: N(E_F) increases by ~30% from Hg1223 to Hg1234, slightly less than the 4/3 layer ratio due to IP having lower per-plane N(E_F) than OP.
